dependencies.surviving_critique_title: Threshold Effects Below Critical VAD Prevalence Levels
dependencies.rejected_critique_title: Threshold Effects for Herd Protection in High-Mortality Settings
dependencies.justification: Both critiques examine threshold effects in VAS effectiveness, though from different angles - the surviving critique focuses on individual-level VAD thresholds while the rejected one examined community-level herd protection thresholds.

dependencies.surviving_critique_title: Meta-Analysis Publication Bias in Historical Evidence Base
dependencies.rejected_critique_title: Short-Term Protection Window Creating Mortality Displacement
dependencies.justification: The surviving critique questions whether VAS effects are overstated due to publication bias, while the rejected critique argued for mortality displacement that would reduce true benefits - the rejection of displacement based on sustained effects across follow-up periods strengthens the publication bias concern.

dependencies.surviving_critique_title: Systematic Timing Delays Between Supplementation Rounds
dependencies.rejected_critique_title: Seasonal and Campaign-Timing Cost Variations Not Reflected
dependencies.justification: Both critiques address timing-related challenges in VAS programs - the surviving critique focuses on delays extending protection intervals while the rejected one examined cost variations from timing factors.
